subcodes.first_line: O bird of the nest of the love of God! The melody of divine mysteries, which issueth from the throat of heavenly love, hath reached the ears of the birds of the gardens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طیر آشیان محبت الله آواز راز که از حنجر عشق الهی ظاهر و صادر بسمع طیور حدائق
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @love of God, @mystical themes, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @humility; meekness; lowliness
